task: place the gray bowl in the oven
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A gray bowl with a yellow object inside sits on a wooden table. A green bowl is nearby, and a blue oven is visible. The gray bowl is rigid with a rim; the oven has an open door. STRATEGY - Reach the gray bowl at its rim for a stable grasp, lift it, transport it to the oven, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the bowl or misaligning it with the oven. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bowl rim; Step 2 grasp rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport to oven; Step 4 place inside oven.

Goal: inside(gray_bowl, oven)
Scene: gray_bowl, green_bowl, blue_oven, table
Step 1: reach(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, gray_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, gray_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: holding(gray_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(gray_bowl)
Step 3: transport(gray_bowl -> oven)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the oven
  spatial: above(gray_bowl, oven, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(gray_bowl)
  done_when: above(gray_bowl, oven, 0.05)
Step 4: place(gray_bowl -> oven)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the oven
  contact: surface_contact(gray_bowl, oven) [completion]; released(gray_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(gray_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(gray_bowl, oven) AND released(gray_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
the rim of the gray bowl
an empty area inside the oven
an empty area inside the oven
